            winner_id TEXT,
            scores_json TEXT,

            child_id TEXT,
            generation INTEGER,
            created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        );
    """)
    
    conn.commit()

def create_seed_beings(conn, domain_key, domain_config):
    """Seed each domain with founding beings."""
    beings_created = []
    
    for role in domain_config["roles"]:
        being_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
